effectOfOriginalFiveAttempts.reason: Each attempt failed while parsing targets, before official-status collection inside the runner and before score, settle, claim, or approval-revocation commands.

incident: Block K postgame watchdog deterministic manifest-schema failure
repairs: Added a schema-tolerant target adapter and strict six-contest/18-speculation identity assertions.
Ran the target, official-final, closing-line, API, process, commitment, position, and allowance preflight under a clean systemd-like environment.
Added unattended closing-line evidence fallback to the pre-action database capture because the user systemd manager intentionally does not inherit the database connection string.
Added bounded transaction-receipt polling after one transient RPC null-receipt response.
Changed the watchdog to halt early on deterministic schema/code/config fingerprints instead of replaying them five times.
rootCause: The postgame runner expected contest fields awayTeam/homeTeam and nested speculationIds, while setup-summary.json uses away/home and a top-level speculations map.
watchdogBehavior: The watchdog treated absence of a terminal summary as retryable and replayed the same deterministic error five times before its bounded stop.
